message:
chore: bump version to 0.3.0 for release

Bump all 20 workspace crate versions to 0.3.0 and update inter-crate
dependency specifiers. Fix shadow_task_execution test to filter
non-blocking terminal output divergence (aligning with existing
mismatch_is_blocking policy).

190 commits since v0.2.1: 76 features (incl. ftui-a11y crate, render
pipeline perf, focus/modal system, security hardening), 49 fixes,
10 refactors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,10 +8,10 @@ All notable changes to [FrankenTUI](https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/franken
 
 ---
 
-## [Unreleased] (after v0.2.1)
+## [0.3.0] (2026-04-12)
 
-> Commits on `main` since the v0.2.1 tag (2026-03-07).
-> Compare: <https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui/compare/v0.2.1...main>
+> 190 commits since v0.2.1 (2026-03-07).
+> Compare: <https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui/compare/v0.2.1...v0.3.0>
 
 ### Accessibility (ftui-a11y) -- New Crate

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ members = [
 exclude = ["fuzz"]
 
 [workspace.package]
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankentui"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "doctor_frankentui"
-version = "0.2.0"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 publish = false
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ fastapi-output = { version = "0.2.0", default-features = false }
 sqlmodel-console = "0.2.0"
 sha2 = "0.10.9"
 regex-lite = "0.1.6"
-ftui-runtime = { path = "../ftui-runtime", version = "0.2.1", default-features = false }
+ftui-runtime = { path = "../ftui-runtime", version = "0.3.0", default-features = false }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.7.0"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-a11y"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Accessibility layer for FrankenTUI"
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "accessibility", "a11y"]
 categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui", "accessibility"]
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.0" }
 ahash = "0.8"
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-backend"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Backend traits for FrankenTUI: platform abstraction for input, presentation, and time."
@@ -12,5 +12,5 @@ keywords = ["tui", "terminal", "ui", "ftui", "frankentui"]
 categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.1" }
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.2.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.0" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.3.0" }

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-core"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Terminal lifecycle, capabilities, and event parsing for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-i18n"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Localization catalog and interpolation utilities for FrankenTUI."

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-pty"
-version = "0.2.2"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "PTY-backed test utilities for FrankenTUI."
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 
 [dependencies]
 frankenterm-core = { version = "0.2.0", features = ["ws-codec"] }
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.1", features = ["crossterm"] }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.0", features = ["crossterm"] }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]

-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "ftui-style"
-version = "0.2.1"
+version = "0.3.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 description = "Style, theme, and color primitives for FrankenTUI."
@@ -14,15 +14,15 @@ categories = ["command-line-interface", "gui"]
 [dependencies]
 ahash = "0.8"
 arc-swap = "1.8.2"
-ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.2.1" }
+ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.3.0" }
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"], optional = true }

 serde = ["dep:serde"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.2.1" }
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.3.0" }
 tracing-test = "0.2.5"
 proptest = "1.7.0"
